g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the internet see when a private subnet sends traffic through a NAT gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does the NAT gateway use the Internet Gateway to reach the internet?')
sendPrompt('Why does the NAT Gateway live in the public subnet?')
sendPrompt('Why do we put one NAT Gateway per availability zone?')
sendPrompt('What is an Elastic IP and why does the NAT Gateway need one?')
sendPrompt('How does a NAT Gateway translate private IP addresses?')
sendPrompt('Does each NAT Gateway have its own Elastic IP?')
sendPrompt('How much does a NAT Gateway cost?')
sendPrompt('What kind of traffic does a private subnet send through the NAT Gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does a private subnet route table point to its NAT Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the NAT Gateway in one AZ goes down?')
sendPrompt('What types of servers typically run in private subnets?')
sendPrompt('Why is the database in a private subnet?')
sendPrompt('What is a cache and why does it go in a private subnet?')
